memberdef.name: UQ15ToF32ObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "cvt.UQ15ToF32", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(UQ15ToF32Object), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)UQ15ToF32Obj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "UQ15ToF32 type.", .tp_methods = UQ15ToF32Obj_methods, .tp_new = UQ15ToF32Obj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)UQ15ToF32Obj_init, }
